snippet.title: OFFICIAL TRAILER / DOPPELGANGER / FAMILYAY
snippet.description:
Gaano mo kakilala ang sarili mong pamilya… kung ang nasa harap mo ay hindi na pala sila?

Isang pamilya ang haharap sa isang misteryong hindi nila maipaliwanag. Isang engkanto ang gumagaya sa kanilang anyo, sumisira sa kanilang tiwala, at unti-unting binabaligtad ang kanilang mundo.

Kapag ang pamilyang minamahal mo ay maaaring hindi na sila… sino ang iyong paniniwalaan?

Isang horror story ng panlilinlang, kababalaghan, at takot na hindi mo matatakasan.

Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.
